# ItMadeMyDay

> A private iOS app for saving anything that gives you happiness, hope, or made your day — images, texts, audio, links, articles, compliments, memories, and more. No account required. No data collected. Everything stays on your device.

ItMadeMyDay is a free iOS app that acts as a personal joy vault. Users save anything that matters to them — a photo, a screenshot, a voice note, an article, a compliment, a memory, a quote, a conversation, a link, an audio clip, an image, an achievement — any moment or thing that gave them happiness or hope. A Boost feature lets users browse their saved moments filtered by current mood (Sad, Anxious, Lonely, Celebrating, Grateful, or custom moods they create). Collections allow curated groups of moments with custom names and colors. Built fully local-first — no server, no sync, no tracking, no account.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://it-made-my-day.com/): App overview, features, and download
- [Support](https://it-made-my-day.com/support.html): Help, contact, and FAQs
- [Privacy Policy](https://it-made-my-day.com/privacy-policy.html): Zero-data privacy policy

## What This Product Does

- Saves anything that made your day or gives you happiness or hope — images, text, screenshots, audio clips, links, articles, compliments, memories, conversations, quotes, photos, achievements, and more
- No rules about what belongs in the Vault — if it matters to you, it belongs here
- Provides mood-based browsing via Boost (filter by Sad, Anxious, Lonely, Celebrating, Grateful, or create your own moods)
- Organizes moments into user-created Collections with custom names and colors
- Operates fully offline with no account, no cloud sync, and no data collection
- Supports JSON export and import for data portability and device transfer
- Available free on iOS with no in-app purchases or subscriptions
- No limit on the number of moments saved — only device storage is the constraint

## Privacy

ItMadeMyDay collects zero user data. The app has no server connection. All data is stored on the user's device and never transmitted anywhere. Deletion via Settings → Delete All Data is immediate and complete with no server-side copy.
